title: Sing Without Limits
outcomeSummary: Stand, breathe, and vocalize without tension
Build stamina for consistent singing
Unlock your first reliable mixed voice moment

title: Hear Anything, Repeat Anything
outcomeSummary: Name intervals and chords by ear
Transcribe melodies from songs
Sing tight harmonies on demand

title: Train Your Musical instincts
outcomeSummary: Clap and count complex rhythms
Memorize solos and parts fast
Lock into tempo without drifting

title: Perform Like You Mean It
outcomeSummary: Own the stage in 60 seconds
Connect lyrics to audience emotion
Recover from mistakes without breaking character

title: Think Like A Career Vocalist
outcomeSummary: Build routines that scale your voice
Use journaling to accelerate progress
Handle pressure, doubt, and audition nerves

title: Sing Any Genre, On Command
outcomeSummary: Switch tone between R&B, pop, and gospel

title: Get Paid To Sing
outcomeSummary: Package your voice for church, studio, or stage

title: Make Records, Not excuses
